text:
Bright, brilliant and bold.

Getty

The Olympics are in Paris this year—so naturally, they are set to be chicest games in recent memory. Exhibit A: last night, stars turned up for the very stylish Prelude to the Olympics event at Paris' Fondation Louis Vuitton. Amongst them wasCharlize Theron, who was there to co-chair the event alongside Serena Williams, Rosalía and Omar S—and Theron certainly set the bar for the kind of crisp, sporty looks we're expecting in Paris for this year's Olympic Games.

The actress wore a bright, bold white mini dress. The asymmetrical one-shoulder shift dress had one strap, which was attached to a dramatic cape shoulder that draped like a waterfall to skim floor. She paired this chic number with delicate accessories: a diamond bracelet, gold strappy heeled sandals, a few dainty diamond rings, and a quilted gold clutch by Christian Dior—she has, of course, been fronting the brand's J'Adore fragrance since 2004 and sheattended their pre-Fall show in April. She completed the sophisticated look with a silver manicure and a low updo with elegant loose waves falling on one side of her face.

Getty

Theron shared a video of her appearance at the event onInstagram, writing, "About last night…in Paris."

Zendaya, fresh off the sartorial success of herChallengerspress tour, offered up another sleek and sporty look at the event,wearing a slinky black sequined maxi dress.

Theron may have been the perfect picture of red carpet glamour at last night's pre-Olympics event, but, as the actress has recently revealed, her day-to-day life has been a little more relatable lately. These days, she spends much of her timeraising her two preteen daughters.

Getty

"Oh, my god, they're so embarrassed by me constantly," she toldE!on the red carpet earlier this month. "They're kids, they’re girls, you know? I have a preteen, and I feel like I have a 9-year-old who thinks she’s a 13-year-old. It's a lot of girl in our house."

She added, "I'm just trying to keep my head above water because they are smart and they are witty—and they are firecrackers. But they do not go, 'Oh my god, mom, you're so amazing."

title: See Charlize Theron's Sleek Sporty White Minidress
description: Charlize Theron attended a pre-Olympics event wearing a bright one-shoulder white minidress.
